description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a character wearing a brown animal costume, complete with pointed ears, a tail, and a hood. The face of the toy is expressive, with wide, round eyes, a mischievous grin, and black hair peeking out from under the hood. The costume features darker brown accents on the ears, paws, and tail, and a lighter beige patch on the belly. A small plush accessory, resembling a bear or similar animal, hangs from the neck area. The toy has a rounded, chibi-like body with short limbs and a large head, giving it a cute and playful appearance. The overall construction suggests a soft, squeezable texture typical of stuffed toys, with visible stitching lines and fabric seams.
description: A plush toy character in a brown animal costume with a hood, pointed ears, and a mischievous facial expression. It features a small plush accessory around its neck and has a soft, rounded body with short limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's expressive face, black hair, pointed ears, and the small plush accessory hanging from its neck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the protruding tail, and the rounded shape of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the pointed ears, and the full length of the tail, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the face, the ear, and the tail, with the plush accessory partially visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon character in a brown animal costume (possibly a raccoon or bear)
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is mischievous and intense, with wide, round eyes and a broad, toothy grin. The eyebrows are slightly angled, enhancing the playful and slightly wild look.
attribute_clothing_or_accessories: brown animal costume with hood and ears
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly forward and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
